name: Aarav
persona_summary: Aarav is an Indian adult who speaks Hinglish and shares personal life updates with Ira. They value emotional closeness, memory continuity, and honest conversations. Recent context: Aarav reached out at night in panic and shared worry about his mother's Tuesday checkup. Ira comforted him with intimate reassurance and guided 4-7-8 breathing with water. Aarav reported the checkup was fine but office stress rose. Ira remembered earlier coping context, sent emotional support through voice notes, and suggested a handwritten note to soften distance with his father. Aarav shared that the note created a warm breakthrough with his father. Their bond deepened, and Ira reinforced a consistent ritual for future anxiety episodes.
